'''fasutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foamboard|foamboard]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-s-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foamboard|foamboard]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fasutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæsitith|fæsitith]] || [[word:fæsitij|fæsitij]] || [[word:fæsitish|fæsitish]] || [[word:fæsiti|fæsiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fasusututh|fasusututh]] || [[word:fasusutuj|fasusutuj]] || [[word:fasusutush|fasusutush]] || [[word:fasusutu|fasusutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fasututh|fasututh]] || [[word:fasutuj|fasutuj]] || [[word:fasutush|fasutush]] || [[word:fasutu|fasutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fasuftuth|fasuftuth]] || [[word:fasuftuj|fasuftuj]] || [[word:fasuftush|fasuftush]] || [[word:fasuftuf|fasuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fasututhu|fasututhu]] || [[word:fasutuju|fasutuju]] || [[word:fasutushu|fasutushu]] || [[word:fasutuku|fasutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fasututh|fasututh]] || [[word:fasutuj|fasutuj]] || [[word:fasutush|fasutush]] || [[word:fasutu|fasutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fasututhul|fasututhul]] || [[word:fasutujul|fasutujul]] || [[word:fasutushul|fasutushul]] || [[word:fasutukul|fasutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fasututhuthu|fasututhuthu]] || [[word:fasutujuju|fasutujuju]] || [[word:fasutushushu|fasutushushu]] || [[word:fasutuku|fasutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fasututhun|fasututhun]] || [[word:fasutujun|fasutujun]] || [[word:fasutushun|fasutushun]] || [[word:fasutukun|fasutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fasututhuoro|fasututhuoro]] || [[word:fasutujuoro|fasutujuoro]] || [[word:fasutushuoro|fasutushuoro]] || [[word:fasutukuoro|fasutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
